metadata.label: Visibility Infrastructure
import_order: 1. Import all items with issue_type = Epic (parent = WSA-508)
2. Import all items with issue_type = Story (parent = their Epic summary)
3. Import all items with issue_type = Sub-task (parent = their Story summary)
4. Import outcome-level Action Items -- they use 'Related to' link (not parent-child) via link_to field
5. Import root-level Action Items (cross-cutting risks, questions) -- they use parent = [VI-OC-01] Foundation Planning and Architecture Complete

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-01] Foundation Planning and Architecture Complete
work_items.description: Environment inventory, architecture design, integration architecture, A2W telemetry strategy, script rationalization, Elastic log mapping.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-01.1] Environment Inventory and Gap Assessment
Document all Windows and Linux hosts in scope (count, OS version, role, owner)
Inventory all PASOE instances (server count, session limits, NGINX configs)
Map current CheckMK alert coverage to hosts
Review Elastic index structure and log sources
Document all current PagerDuty services, escalation policies, and on-call schedules
Identify infrastructure NOT owned by DMSi (TierPoint-managed, NetApp, customer-side)
Produce completed inventory spreadsheet (reviewed and signed off by Andy and Brent)
[VI-OC-01.2] Dynatrace Architecture Design
Determine OneAgent deployment model
Design ActiveGate topology (number, placement, redundancy)
Confirm network connectivity requirements
Identify Progress OpenEdge monitoring constraints (VI-Q-25)
Define monitoring layers and owner for each
Document the RDP delivery model limitation for RUM
Produce architecture diagram reviewed by Robin and Andy
[VI-OC-01.3] Integration Architecture
Design PagerDuty integration (alerting profiles, severity mapping, service routing)
Design status page automation (Dynatrace entity states to service components)
Design CheckMK coexistence plan (alert deduplication strategy)
Define alert ownership model (Dynamo, DMSi Eng, Support)
Document integration architecture in a single reference document
[VI-OC-01.4] A2W Telemetry Strategy (M3 Deliverable)
Document current-state monitoring approach for RDP-delivered Agility
Define target-state monitoring requirements for A2W browser-delivered interface
Map Dynatrace capabilities to A2W target state
Identify instrumentation work required by dev team at A2W launch
Produce telemetry strategy document (reviewed by Robin and engineering leads)
[VI-OC-01.5] Custom Script Rationalization Planning
Inventory all custom monitoring scripts (CheckMK modules, standalone, Elastic-feeding)
Centralize script inventory into GitHub
Classify each script: replaced by OneAgent / replaceable via Extension Framework / must retain
Document retained scripts (what they monitor and why OneAgent does not cover)
Identify scripts feeding data into or querying from Elastic indices
[VI-OC-01.6] Elastic Inventory and Log Source Mapping
work_items.description: Elastic Inventory and Log Source Mapping

work_items.summary: Identify Elastic cluster ownership (admin credentials, version, hosting)
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-01.6] Elastic Inventory and Log Source Mapping

work_items.summary: Export inventory of all Elastic indices (names, retention, volumes, daily ingest rate)
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-01.6] Elastic Inventory and Log Source Mapping

work_items.summary: Map each index to a log source
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-01.6] Elastic Inventory and Log Source Mapping

work_items.summary: Identify Kibana dashboards in use (who, what, frequency)
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-01.6] Elastic Inventory and Log Source Mapping

work_items.summary: Identify Elastic alerts or Watcher rules in use
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-01.6] Elastic Inventory and Log Source Mapping

work_items.summary: Estimate daily log ingest volume in GB/day
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-01.6] Elastic Inventory and Log Source Mapping

work_items.summary: Produce completed log source inventory (reviewed by Andy and Brent)
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-01.6] Elastic Inventory and Log Source Mapping

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-02] Telemetry Strategy and Licensing Resolved
work_items.description: ABL telemetry evaluation, OpenTelemetry feasibility, log retention review, licensing procurement, RBAC design, New Relic clarification.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-02.1] ABL Telemetry Evaluation
Document ABL telemetry critical checkpoints
Quality audit of existing ABL/OE telemetry against industry standards
Diagnostic coverage assessment
Decision on Elastic migration path, Prometheus, and additional telemetry needs
[VI-OC-02.2] OpenTelemetry Feasibility Assessment
Confirm Progress OpenEdge version supports OpenTelemetry SDK
Evaluate feasibility of custom spans for ABL-level transaction context (VI-D-14)
Document OpenTelemetry gap vs. native OneAgent JVM detection
Produce feasibility report (reviewed by Dan and Matt)
[VI-OC-02.3] Log Retention and Compliance Review
Confirm current Elastic log retention policy (VI-Q-09)
Leanne (GRC) confirms compliance requirements for log retention (VI-D-17)
Measure daily log ingest volume (GB/day) from Elastic index sizes
Document retention decision and DDU impact
[VI-OC-02.4] Licensing and Procurement
Estimate host unit count for OneAgent licensing
Evaluate DPS vs. classic host-based licensing (3-year TCO $784K-$1.075M)
Engage Dynatrace account team for POC tenant or trial environment
Confirm SaaS vs. Managed deployment decision (VI-D-01)
Finalize POC scope and DPS vs. Classic decision
Confirm budget authorization with Hilltop
Route through DMSi procurement process
Complete licensing procurement (contract executed)
Document final licensing scope and cost (reviewed by Hilltop)
[VI-OC-02.5] RBAC Design
Define Admin / Operator / Viewer role mapping to DMSi teams (VI-D-06)
Confirm whether customer-visible dashboards are shared externally or internal
[VI-OC-02.6] New Relic Scope Clarification
Confirm whether New Relic is actively used and for what purpose
If active, map New Relic scope to Dynatrace capabilities
Define coexistence plan or replacement timeline
[VI-OC-03] Dynatrace Platform and Integrations Deployed
work_items.description: Dynatrace tenant setup, ActiveGate deployment, PagerDuty integration, Status page integration.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-03.1] Dynatrace Tenant Setup
Provision Dynatrace SaaS tenant (or deploy Managed per VI-D-01)
Configure network zones to reflect DMSi data center topology
Set up user accounts with RBAC model per VI-D-06
Configure tagging strategy (environment, tier, product, owner)
Enable auto-tagging rules aligned to naming conventions
[VI-OC-03.2] ActiveGate Deployment
Deploy Environment ActiveGate(s) on designated on-prem hosts
Validate outbound HTTPS connectivity from ActiveGate to Dynatrace SaaS
Configure ActiveGate for OneAgent traffic routing
Test failover if multiple ActiveGates deployed
Document ActiveGate host requirements and reserve capacity
[VI-OC-03.3] PagerDuty Integration
Configure Dynatrace alerting profiles (start conservative)
Create PagerDuty integration via portable webhook layer (VI-D-19)
Map Dynatrace severity levels to PagerDuty priority (P1/P2/P3)
Route alerts to appropriate PagerDuty services and escalation policies
Test end-to-end: trigger test problem, confirm PagerDuty incident creation
Document deduplication logic for CheckMK parallel operation (VI-D-07)
[VI-OC-03.4] Status Page Integration
Map Dynatrace monitored entities to status page service components
Configure Dynatrace webhook to trigger status page updates
Define status page update logic (Degraded, Outage, Maintenance)
Test automated status update flow end-to-end in staging
Define manual override process for incorrect automated updates
[VI-OC-04] Host Fleet Instrumented
work_items.description: OneAgent deployment across all hosts. PASOE/OpenEdge monitoring. Highest-risk: OpenEdge ABL detection unknown until POC.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-04.1] OneAgent Deployment -- Infrastructure Monitoring
Confirm RHEL 7 OneAgent compatibility (VI-Q-17)
Test OneAgent install on non-production host
Document OneAgent deployment procedure (reviewed by DMSi Eng)
Deploy OneAgent to application hosts (PASOE, app servers)
Deploy OneAgent to database hosts (monitor for performance impact)
Deploy OneAgent to NGINX Hosts
Validate process group detection on each host type
Confirm infrastructure metrics flowing (CPU, memory, disk I/O, network)
Create host groups in Dynatrace matching DMSi environment topology
[VI-OC-04.2] Progress OpenEdge and PASOE Monitoring
Validate OneAgent detection of PASOE processes (Java-based JVM)
Determine OpenEdge ABL process detectability vs. custom extensions
Configure Extension Framework 2.0 for OpenEdge-specific metrics (if required)
Instrument NGINX with Dynatrace NGINX extension
Define process availability monitoring for PASOE
Document gap analysis: monitored vs. unmonitored for OpenEdge
[VI-OC-05] Infrastructure Visibility Validated
work_items.description: 30-day validation: Dynatrace >= CheckMK. Coverage >= 95%. Max 2 cycles. Fallback: trigger VI-OC-15.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-05.1] Initial Infrastructure Dashboards
Build infrastructure health overview dashboard
Build PASOE/NGINX process dashboard
Build capacity planning dashboard
Review dashboards with Andy and Brent
[VI-OC-05.2] Coverage Gap Analysis Report
Compare Dynatrace host list against VI-OC-01.1 inventory
Identify hosts not reporting or reporting incomplete metrics
Document coverage percentage and remediation plan
[VI-OC-05.3] 30-Day Validation Report
Compile 30-day comparison: Dynatrace detection vs. CheckMK detection
Document incidents detected by CheckMK but missed by Dynatrace (and vice versa)
Produce sign-off document for Andy and Brent
[VI-OC-06] Log Management Migrated
work_items.description: Parallel with VI-OC-04/VI-OC-05. Log activation, key source ingestion, parsing, Elastic alert migration, 30-day parallel validation.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-06.1] Dynatrace Log Management Activation
Enable Dynatrace Log Management in tenant (confirm DDU allocation)
Configure log ingestion scope per VI-D-18
[VI-OC-06.2] Key Log Source Ingestion
Configure OneAgent log monitoring for PASOE application logs
Configure OneAgent log monitoring for NGINX access and error logs
Configure Windows Event Log forwarding
Configure Linux syslog forwarding
Configure OpenEdge database logs
[VI-OC-06.3] Log Processing and Parsing
Define log processing rules (extract severity, customer ID, transaction type)
Build custom parsing rules for NGINX, PASOE, and OpenEdge formats
Validate log search and query capability vs. Kibana
[VI-OC-06.4] Remaining Log Source Migration
Identify and configure remaining log sources not covered in VI-OC-06.2
Recreate operationally used Kibana dashboards in Dynatrace
Confirm all Elastic alert rules recreated or marked deprecated
[VI-OC-06.5] Elastic Alert Migration
Identify Elastic-based alerts routing to PagerDuty
Recreate highest-priority log-based alerts in Dynatrace
Capture Elastic admin access and runbook documentation (VI-Q-12)
[VI-OC-06.6] Parallel Validation
Initiate 30-day parallel validation (Elastic + Dynatrace simultaneously)
Engineering validation: confirm incident investigation tasks using Dynatrace logs
Compare Elastic and Dynatrace log parity and document gaps
[VI-OC-07] External Availability Monitoring Operational
work_items.description: Synthetic monitors, MTTD baseline, network path monitoring, NetApp ONTAP. Enables M3 tiered service promise.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-07.1] Customer Journey Discovery
Working session to identify top 5 customer-impacting workflows for synthetic monitoring
[VI-OC-07.2] Synthetic Monitor Scripting
Script login flow (mandatory first), then top 4 additional journeys from VI-OC-07.1
[VI-OC-07.3] Private Synthetic Location Deployment
Deploy Private Synthetic Location for RDP-based access testing
[VI-OC-07.4] External Synthetic Location Configuration
Deploy minimum 2 external locations for outage detection independent of internal network
[VI-OC-07.5] Synthetic Alert Configuration
Integrate synthetic failures with PagerDuty P1 policy; confirm first-update timer <= 30 minutes
[VI-OC-07.6] MTTD Baseline Measurement
Begin tracking MTTD from synthetic detection vs. first customer report; establish 30-day baseline
[VI-OC-07.7] A2W Synthetic Readiness
Document synthetic test specifications for A2W web interface
[VI-OC-07.8] Network Path Monitoring
Evaluate Dynatrace Network Monitoring vs. ThousandEyes (VI-D-13)
Deploy chosen network monitoring tool for critical paths
[VI-OC-07.9] NetApp ONTAP Extension
Configure NetApp ONTAP extension for storage IOPS and latency monitoring
[VI-OC-08] Application Telemetry Operational
work_items.description: APM scope, PASOE service detection, custom metrics, OpenTelemetry eval. HIGHEST SCHEDULE RISK: dev team dependency.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-08.1] APM Scope Confirmation
Define instrumentable scope in PASOE/OpenEdge vs. custom extension vs. not feasible (based on VI-OC-04 gap analysis)
[VI-OC-08.2] PASOE Service Detection Configuration
Define service detection rules in Dynatrace for PASOE endpoints (Java-based JVM)
[VI-OC-08.3] Custom Metric Definition
Define business-level metrics: active user sessions, transaction success rate, report job queue depth
[VI-OC-08.4] OpenTelemetry Evaluation (VI-D-14)
Assess OpenTelemetry SDK instrumentation in Progress OpenEdge ABL for custom spans and traces
[VI-OC-08.5] Infrastructure and Service Dashboards
Build engineer-facing views: host health, PASOE instance status, storage IOPS, network latency
[VI-OC-08.6] RUM Design (A2W Future State)
Finalize RUM implementation specification for A2W web interface (VI-D-15)
[VI-OC-09] Baselines and Data Quality Validated
work_items.description: Infrastructure, application, and synthetic baselines. SLO definitions. PagerDuty AIOps confirmation. Engineering review.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-09.1] Infrastructure Baseline
Document normal ranges for CPU, memory, disk I/O, network across all host types; identify seasonal patterns
[VI-OC-09.2] Application Baseline
Define normal request throughput, error rates, and response time distributions for key PASOE endpoints
[VI-OC-09.3] Synthetic Baseline
Establish normal synthetic response times and success rates across all monitored journeys
[VI-OC-09.4] SLO Definition
Formally define SLOs for each monitoring layer in Dynatrace; configure error budget burn rate alerts
[VI-OC-09.5] PagerDuty AIOps Confirmation
Confirm PagerDuty AIOps event volume covers Dynatrace projected events (VI-Q-21)
[VI-OC-09.6] Baseline Review Session
Working session to validate baselines match engineering intuition before gating alert thresholds
[VI-OC-09.7] Data Quality Validation
Validate data against reality -- no competing shadow spreadsheets or manual reports
[VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live
work_items.description: Alert audit and tuning (<50/week target). PagerDuty AIOps. Persona dashboards. Trust validation.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-10.1] Alert Audit
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live

work_items.summary: Review all Dynatrace anomaly detection settings and custom alert rules; identify noise vs. signal
[VI-OC-10.2] Threshold Tuning
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live

work_items.summary: Adjust static and anomaly detection thresholds; target <50 actionable alerts/week
[VI-OC-10.3] PagerDuty AIOps Configuration (M4 Deliverable)
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live

work_items.summary: Enable Dynatrace AI Causation; configure PagerDuty Event Intelligence for noise reduction (see VI-OC-16 for detailed rollout)
[VI-OC-10.4] Alert Routing Refinement
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live

work_items.summary: Confirm final PagerDuty service routing logic; validate on-call schedules reflect pod ownership (CW-06)
[VI-OC-10.5] SDLC Event Ingestion (CW-04)
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live

work_items.summary: Connect CI/CD pipeline to Dynatrace SDLC API for CFR and DORA metrics (VI-Q-23)
[VI-OC-10.6] Status Page Templates
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live

work_items.summary: Setup and templates approved; Jared owns customer-facing templates (CW-07)
[VI-OC-10.7] Persona-Specific Dashboards
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live

work_items.summary: Deliver engineering dashboard (host health, service status, alerts)
Deliver support dashboard (customer-facing status, open incidents, SLA tracking)
Deliver leadership dashboard (MTTD trend, alert volume, operational health)
Ensure dashboards are role-based and automatic-to-the-right-person
[VI-OC-10.8] Engineering Trust Validation
work_items.parent: [VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live

work_items.summary: Ask on-call engineers whether Dynatrace alerts are trustworthy and whether alert fatigue has improved
[VI-OC-11] Proactive Operations Validated
work_items.description: MTTD <= 10 min sustained 4 weeks. Status page validated. Error budget policy. Runbook + knowledge transfer. M5 evidence package.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-11.1] MTTD Measurement and Tracking
Confirm synthetic + infrastructure detection within 10 minutes; track MTTD weekly for 4 consecutive weeks
[VI-OC-11.2] Status Page Automation Validation
Confirm automated status page updates are accurate and timely across real incident scenarios
[VI-OC-11.3] RUM Validation (A2W)
If A2W launched, confirm Dynatrace RUM is operational and producing user experience data
[VI-OC-11.4] Incident Response Integration
Confirm Dynatrace problem links in PagerDuty incidents; engineers using Dynatrace for investigation
[VI-OC-11.5] Error Budget Policy
Error budget policy operational; change freeze triggers automatically when budget exhausted
[VI-OC-11.6] Operational Runbook
Document Dynatrace operating procedures for DMSi engineering team
[VI-OC-11.7] Knowledge Transfer
Conduct working sessions with DMSi engineering to ensure Dynatrace can be operated independently
[VI-OC-11.8] M5 Evidence Package
Assemble evidence: MTTD <= 10 min sustained over 4 weeks, alert volume reduction, present to Hilltop
[VI-OC-12] Legacy Systems Decommissioned
work_items.description: Elastic shutdown (TYPE 1 decision). CheckMK decommission evaluation. Gates on BOTH VI-OC-05 and VI-OC-06 validation.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-12.1] Elastic Decommission Execution
Set Elastic ingest to read-only (Dynatrace is sole ingest target)
Confirm no active Elastic alerts or dashboards in use (2-week quiet period)
Archive Elastic data required for compliance or historical analysis
Shut down Elastic cluster (reclaim compute and storage resources)
Document infrastructure cost savings from Elastic decommission
[VI-OC-12.2] CheckMK Decommission Evaluation
If baseline quality sufficient, present recommendation to decommission CheckMK (VI-D-03, CW-01)
[VI-OC-13] A2W Monitoring Readiness
work_items.description: Conditional: Triggers when A2W launch date confirmed. Synthetic test activation + RUM deployment. 6-week lead time needed.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-13.1] A2W Synthetic Tests Activated
Activate synthetic tests developed in VI-OC-07.7 when A2W web interface is available
[VI-OC-13.2] RUM Deployment and Validation
Deploy Dynatrace RUM JavaScript tag on A2W web pages
Validate user session data flowing and user experience metrics populating
Configure RUM-based alerting for page load time degradation and JavaScript errors
[VI-OC-14] Predictive Operations and Advanced Capabilities
work_items.description: DORA metrics, SLI-driven prioritization, customer experience correlation. Triggers after VI-OC-11 complete.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-14.1] DORA Metrics Visibility (M7)
All five DORA metrics derivable from SDLC events if ingestion is complete
[VI-OC-14.2] SLI-Driven Engineering Prioritization
SLI dashboards drive priority for engineering
[VI-OC-14.3] Customer Experience Correlation
Synthetic and APM signals correlated with customer experience models
[VI-OC-14.4] Advanced Platform Capabilities
Evaluate and deploy advanced capabilities (advanced RUM, predictive AI, custom integrations)
[VI-OC-15] Legacy Fallback Activated
work_items.description: Triggers if VI-OC-05 or VI-OC-09 validation fails after max iterations. Legacy systems maintained; revised plan to Hilltop.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-15.1] Validation Failure Root Cause Analysis
Document root cause of validation failure; identify specific gaps and blockers
[VI-OC-15.2] Revised Implementation Plan
Present revised plan to Hilltop with options: extend timeline, reduce scope, or accept partial migration
[VI-OC-16] PagerDuty AIOps Deployed and Validated
work_items.description: 4-phase PagerDuty AIOps deployment: alert grouping, auto-pause, 30-day ML learning, tuning, handover. Already underway.

work_items.summary: [VI-OC-16.1] Phase 1: STL Service Deployment
Enable alert grouping on STL, STL-progress (lowest-risk services)
Validate grouping behavior for 48+ hours
Add auto-pause notifications after grouping confirmed
Monitor for: P1-Critical integrity, alert flow, grouping accuracy
[VI-OC-16.2] Phase 2: Medium/High Risk Service Expansion
Enable alert grouping on BCC-progress, ABC-progress, ABC
72-hour validation for ABC services
Add auto-pause after grouping confirmed
Go/no-go decision made jointly (Dynamo + DMSi)
[VI-OC-16.3] Phase 3: Full Service Deployment
Full deployment across all remaining services
Voicemail services excluded from auto-pause
Go/no-go decision made jointly before proceeding
[VI-OC-16.4] 30-Day Learning Period Monitoring
Weeks 1-2: Active daily monitoring (P1 delays, alert flow, incorrect grouping)
Weeks 3-4: Every-other-day reviews; weekly summary reports
Week 5+: Weekly summary reviews only; DMSi counterparts own day-to-day
[VI-OC-16.5] Tuning and Optimization
Holistic tuning across all services after 30-day learning
Adjust grouping sensitivity and pause windows based on data
Target: <50 actionable alerts/week
[VI-OC-16.6] DMSi Counterpart Handover
1-2 DMSi counterparts identified by Bryan
Counterparts participate in monitoring reviews during rollout
Gradual ownership transfer: observer -> participant -> owner
[VI-OC-16.7] Team Communication
Draft team-wide communication before each phase
Bryan distributes to full engineering team
Content: what changed, what looks different, what has NOT changed, who to contact

action_items.summary: [VI-R-X1] Progress OpenEdge architectural constraints prevent achieving APM depth required...
action_items.description:
Risk: Progress OpenEdge architectural constraints prevent achieving APM depth required for MTTD target
Mitigation: Validate in VI-OC-01 POC; define fallback scope before VI-OC-08

action_items.summary: [VI-R-X2] Dev team remains above 60% reactive load through VI-OC-08, preventing APM instru...
action_items.description:
Risk: Dev team remains above 60% reactive load through VI-OC-08, preventing APM instrumentation work
Mitigation: VI-OC-08 APM scope designed to minimize dev hours; confirm allocation before VI-OC-05 exits

action_items.summary: [VI-R-X3] Dynatrace generates alert noise layered on CheckMK during parallel operation
action_items.description:
Risk: Dynatrace generates alert noise layered on CheckMK during parallel operation
Mitigation: Conservative initial thresholds; soft-launch period; deduplicate in PagerDuty

action_items.summary: [VI-R-X4] A2W migration timeline unknown; RUM and synthetic work may need revisiting
action_items.description:
Risk: A2W migration timeline unknown; RUM and synthetic work may need revisiting
Mitigation: Design A2W monitoring artifacts as "ready to activate" from VI-OC-07 onward

action_items.summary: [VI-R-X5] Access dependencies (server access, Elastic configs, GitHub org) unresolved, blo...
action_items.description:
Risk: Access dependencies (server access, Elastic configs, GitHub org) unresolved, blocking VI-OC-03/VI-OC-04
Mitigation: Formally request access in VI-OC-01.1; escalate to Hilltop if unresolved

action_items.summary: [VI-R-X6] Dynatrace licensing cost exceeds budget, causing mid-implementation scope reduct...
action_items.description:
Risk: Dynatrace licensing cost exceeds budget, causing mid-implementation scope reduction
Mitigation: Complete VI-OC-02.4 before deployment; modular design allows scope reduction without rework

action_items.summary: [VI-R-X7] Dynatrace go-live coincides with a major incident, eroding trust
action_items.description:
Risk: Dynatrace go-live coincides with a major incident, eroding trust
Mitigation: Soft launch with conservative thresholds; Dynamo monitors for first 2 weeks

action_items.summary: [VI-R-01] Environment inventory incomplete due to undocumented hosts or shadow infrastruct...
action_items.description:
Risk: Environment inventory incomplete due to undocumented hosts or shadow infrastructure
Mitigation: Cross-reference CheckMK host list, Elastic log sources, and PagerDuty service map

action_items.summary: [VI-R-08] Status page automation may create incorrect or misleading updates on non-custome...
action_items.description:
Risk: Status page automation may create incorrect or misleading updates on non-customer-impacting issues
Mitigation: Run status page automation in "dry run" mode first

action_items.summary: [VI-R-05] PASOE JVM monitoring works but native OpenEdge ABL session monitoring unknown un...
action_items.description:
Risk: PASOE JVM monitoring works but native OpenEdge ABL session monitoring unknown until POC. Budget 40+ hours for custom extension development if standard detection fails
Mitigation: Validate in VI-OC-04.2 early; use Extension Framework 2.0 as fallback

action_items.summary: [VI-R-06] OneAgent production deployment may require difficult-to-schedule maintenance win...
action_items.description:
Risk: OneAgent production deployment may require difficult-to-schedule maintenance windows. May take 2-3x longer than planned
Mitigation: Start with non-production; coordinate maintenance windows early

action_items.summary: [VI-R-09] Database host OneAgent may cause performance overhead on high-I/O OpenEdge datab...
action_items.description:
Risk: Database host OneAgent may cause performance overhead on high-I/O OpenEdge database hosts
Mitigation: Validate resource overhead in non-production before production deploy

action_items.summary: [VI-R-03] CheckMK provides visibility that Dynatrace cannot replicate for specific host ty...
action_items.description:
Risk: CheckMK provides visibility that Dynatrace cannot replicate for specific host types
Mitigation: Identify gaps in VI-OC-05.2; maintain CheckMK for those hosts

action_items.summary: [VI-R-04] 30-day window insufficient for seasonal workload patterns
action_items.description:
Risk: 30-day window insufficient for seasonal workload patterns
Mitigation: Extend to 45 days if initial data is inconclusive

action_items.summary: [VI-R-10] Elastic admin knowledge siloed to 1-2 individuals; configuration cannot be fully...
action_items.description:
Risk: Elastic admin knowledge siloed to 1-2 individuals; configuration cannot be fully documented if unavailable
Mitigation: Capture admin access and runbook in VI-OC-06.5 early

action_items.summary: [VI-R-11] Daily log ingest volume exceeds DDU budget, requiring scope reduction
action_items.description:
Risk: Daily log ingest volume exceeds DDU budget, requiring scope reduction
Mitigation: Measure actual ingest in VI-OC-06.2 before committing to full scope

action_items.summary: [VI-R-12] Kibana dashboards rely on Elastic-specific query patterns (KQL/Lucene) that do n...
action_items.description:
Risk: Kibana dashboards rely on Elastic-specific query patterns (KQL/Lucene) that do not translate to DQL
Mitigation: Budget additional dashboard rebuild time; prioritize operationally critical dashboards

action_items.summary: [VI-R-13] Private Synthetic Location requires dedicated host; server provisioning may dela...
action_items.description:
Risk: Private Synthetic Location requires dedicated host; server provisioning may delay deployment
Mitigation: Confirm server availability in VI-OC-01.1; provision early

action_items.summary: [VI-R-17] Network path monitoring may require agents in customer environments
action_items.description:
Risk: Network path monitoring may require agents in customer environments
Mitigation: Default to Dynatrace native; evaluate ThousandEyes only if gaps identified

action_items.summary: [VI-R-14] APM instrumentation requires dev team capacity. If dev team at 70% reactive load...
action_items.description:
Risk: APM instrumentation requires dev team capacity. If dev team at 70% reactive load, this slips and M5 at risk. Most significant schedule risk.
Mitigation: Confirm dev team allocation before starting; design for minimal dev hours

action_items.summary: [VI-R-15] OpenEdge ABL not natively supported for distributed tracing. Deep APM may requir...
action_items.description:
Risk: OpenEdge ABL not natively supported for distributed tracing. Deep APM may require significant custom development.
Mitigation: Set realistic expectations with DMSi leadership before starting

action_items.summary: [VI-R-16] Custom business metrics require knowledge of OpenEdge data model only DMSi SMEs ...
action_items.description:
Risk: Custom business metrics require knowledge of OpenEdge data model only DMSi SMEs possess
Mitigation: Plan at least 2 working sessions with Bryan or Andy

action_items.summary: [VI-R-18] Seasonal patterns not captured in baseline window
action_items.description:
Risk: Seasonal patterns not captured in baseline window
Mitigation: Document known seasonal patterns from engineering interviews; flag baseline gaps

action_items.summary: [VI-R-19] Davis AI requires 14-day learning period; baselines may not be calibrated at tar...
action_items.description:
Risk: Davis AI requires 14-day learning period; baselines may not be calibrated at target date
Mitigation: Start data collection early; accept provisional baselines

action_items.summary: [VI-R-07] Initial Dynatrace problem detection may generate flood of new alerts on top of C...
action_items.description:
Risk: Initial Dynatrace problem detection may generate flood of new alerts on top of CheckMK
Mitigation: Conservative thresholds; Dynamo team as "noise filter" for first two weeks
action_items.link_to: [VI-OC-10] Alerting Optimized and Persona Views Live

action_items.summary: [VI-R-PD1] P1-Critical alerts delayed or suppressed by auto-pause
action_items.description:
Risk: P1-Critical alerts delayed or suppressed by auto-pause
Mitigation: Voicemail and critical production alerts excluded from auto-pause; monitored daily

action_items.summary: [VI-R-PD2] Unrelated alerts grouped together, hiding genuine separate issues
action_items.description:
Risk: Unrelated alerts grouped together, hiding genuine separate issues
Mitigation: Start with lowest-risk services; 48-72 hour validation; tuning after 30-day learning

action_items.summary: [VI-R-PD3] Manual PagerDuty changes during rollout corrupt the controlled environment
action_items.description:
Risk: Manual PagerDuty changes during rollout corrupt the controlled environment
Mitigation: Ground rules communicated; Bryan enforces no-change policy; Dynamo documents all changes

action_items.summary: [VI-R-PD4] DMSi counterparts not identified or not available, delaying handover
action_items.description:
Risk: DMSi counterparts not identified or not available, delaying handover
Mitigation: Bryan action item: designate 1-2 counterparts before kickoff
